description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell toolbox with a matte, light beige exterior and subtle surface scuffs, suggesting frequent use. The box features two prominent latches on the front for secure closure and a sturdy, rectangular handle on each end for easy carrying. The front face displays a stenciled alphanumeric code, 'AB-LOC-2247-A', while one side has a faint rectangular label area, possibly for identification or inventory purposes. The overall design is utilitarian, with slightly rounded edges and a robust, molded plastic construction. The box appears to be a single-compartment unit, with no visible external trays or drawers. Its size and build indicate it is suitable for storing and transporting tools or small equipment in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or maintenance vehicles.
description: A sturdy, rectangular beige toolbox with dual front latches, side handles, and visible surface wear, designed for secure tool storage and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing two latches and a stenciled code 'AB-LOC-2247-A' on the lower section.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single rectangular handle and a faint label area on the lower half.
description_view_2: Rear view with no latches or markings, only the plain, slightly scuffed surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a matching handle and label area, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed, molded plastic handles on each short end; ergonomic grip with slight recess for fingers.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-mounted plastic clasp latches; simple snap-shut design with no visible keyhole or lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: 'AB-LOC-2247-A' stenciled on the front lower section
Faint rectangular label area on each short side
